target: 46. Rainy Monday
Hizuru Minakata
It's starting to pour... The forecast was wrong, huh, Hizuru?
Forecast, prediction, warning, assumption, plan, foresight... Since the dawn of history, nothing starting with "pre" has ever been reliable.
…Is it really under this manhole?
Yes. I have a bad feeling.
Let's hope my premonition is wrong.
Mio Kofune
I wonder if this will stop...
Tomorrow is the festival, so it'll be a problem if it doesn't clear up.
Mio... you aren't going...?
I don't know... Right now... there's so much going on.
That's true... sorry.
Ah…
No, look! I... I don't even have a yukata!
Oh, is that all, don't worry about that! I'll lend you mine and dress you up! I have one that would look great on you, Mio.
Thanks, Tokiko. But still...
Please, Mio!! Stay with me tomorrow!?
…Tokiko…?
Waaaaah, this is the worst!!
…Who is it…?
I'm soaking wet~~~~!! Let me take shelter from the rain here!!
Haaah, what a mess...
Oh? Are you kids from this island...? High schoolers?
Ah… yes.
Wait a second, Mio!!
Who are you? Coming in so suddenly...
Huh!? Ah~~~~~ sorry, sorry!!
I'm <color=#GF_TIPS_038>Miura</color> from the Wakayama North Police Station~~~.
Do you know the Kobayakawas from Koba Mart? I'd liiiiike to ask you a few questions about them~~.
